Description: Structural Engineer — structural framing design and calculations for roof/mezzanine/crane runway/service pit framing plans (84 hr parametric LOE)
SourceSection: Steps 1-4 (design input collection; structural system selection; preliminary + IFC framing plan production)
Notes: Lead engineer effort covering structural system selection; column grid design; crane runway framing; mezzanine framing; roof framing; service pit header framing; NBC load determination; IFC drawing production; code compliance

Description: BIM Technician — CAD/BIM drawing production for structural framing plan sheets (36 hr parametric LOE)
SourceSection: Steps 3-4 (produce preliminary framing plans; produce IFC framing plans)
Notes: Drawing production for anticipated ~5 sheets (ground level framing; mezzanine framing; roof framing; crane runway framing; general notes) per Specification anticipated artifacts

Description: Project Manager — coordination and oversight of structural framing plan deliverable (6 hr parametric LOE)
SourceSection: Steps 1-6 (full procedure oversight; County approval coordination; interdisciplinary coordination)
Notes: PM effort for client coordination; County preliminary approval gate; interdisciplinary review coordination

Description: Cost Estimator — quantity takeoff and cost benchmarking support for structural framing plans (4 hr parametric LOE)
Notes: Estimator support for framing material takeoff and cost benchmarking during design

Description: Internal QA review — structural framing plan quality review and cross-discipline coordination check
Notes: Includes V-01 through V-11 verification checks; cross-discipline coordination check; column grid overlay comparison with DEL-002-02; included within Structural Engineer and PM hours above

Description: P.Eng. stamp and signature — IFC framing plan drawing set signing and stamping
Notes: P.Eng. stamp and signature on all IFC sheets per REQ-FP-12; included within Structural Engineer hours above

Description: County preliminary design submission and approval coordination
Notes: Preliminary framing plans submitted per R-01 s3.3.2; included within PM and Structural Engineer hours above
